name: messagestudio
author: Taako
description: A standalone EmbedUtils-compatible rich-message studio with legacy embeds, Components V2, stored messages, webhooks, JSON/YAML imports, and a visual dashboard builder.
install_msg: MessageStudio loaded. EmbedUtils-style commands are available under `[p]embed`; use `[p]embed dashboard` for the visual Components V2 builder.
short: Create, store, send, edit, and visually build embeds and Components V2 messages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores saved message payloads, their author Discord user IDs, lock settings, and usage counts when moderators use the message storage commands.
